---
name: Skill proposal
about: Propose a focused atomic skill.
title: "Skill: "
labels: enhancement, skill
---

## User and Job

Who uses this skill, and what recurring task does it help them complete?

## Trigger

What user request should activate this skill?

## Artifact

What concrete output should the skill produce?

Examples: brief, memo, checklist, runbook, test plan, scorecard, report.

## Safety Boundaries

What should stay human-reviewed, read-only, draft-first, or approval-gated?

## Existing Overlap

Which existing skills or bundles are close?

## Validation Scenario

What scenario should be added under `tests/scenarios/`?
